tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    delete 100
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-Web"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-Other-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    delete 101
    delete 102
    delete 100
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Allowed-HTTP"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "Allowed-HTTP"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Deny-HTTPS"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
    next
    edit 102
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-Default-NAT"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set nat enable
    next
end
show firewall policy"}
